hero.title: Building homes that stand the test of time
hero.subtitle: EdgePress designs and builds award-winning custom homes, additions and renovations across Toronto and the Greater Toronto Area — licensed, insured and warranty-backed.

home.trustLine: Licensed, warranty-backed, and proudly members of Canada's leading building associations.
home.servicesSubtitle: From ground-up custom homes to precision renovations, one accountable team manages your project end to end.
home.whySubtitle: Sixteen years of craftsmanship, transparency and results you can trust.

why.title: Fixed-price contracts
why.desc: Detailed, transparent quotes with no hidden costs — you know the full price before we break ground.

why.title: On-time delivery
why.desc: Disciplined scheduling and dedicated project managers keep your build on track and on budget.

why.title: Licensed & warranty-backed
why.desc: Fully licensed and insured, with every new home enrolled in Tarion warranty protection.

why.title: Craftsmanship guarantee
why.desc: Premium materials and skilled trades, backed by our own workmanship warranty on every project.

home.processSubtitle: A clear, five-step process that keeps you informed at every stage.

process.title: Consultation
process.desc: We meet to understand your vision, needs and budget — and give you honest, expert guidance.

process.title: Design & plans
process.desc: Our design team develops drawings, permits and a detailed, fixed-price scope of work.

process.title: Transparent quote
process.desc: You receive a line-by-line quote and schedule — no surprises, no hidden fees.

process.title: Construction
process.desc: A dedicated project manager runs your build with skilled trades and regular updates.

process.title: Handover & warranty
process.desc: We complete a full walkthrough and back every project with our workmanship warranty.

home.projectsSubtitle: A selection of custom homes, additions and renovations we've delivered across the GTA.
home.credentialsSubtitle: We hold the credentials that protect you — and the recognition that reflects our standards.
home.testimonialsSubtitle: We're proud of the relationships we build alongside the homes.
home.ctaSubtitle: Book a free, no-obligation consultation. Tell us about your project and we'll show you what's possible.

services.title: Our services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive design-build and construction services for homeowners and businesses across the Greater Toronto Area.

items.title: Custom Homes
items.desc: Ground-up custom homes built to your lifestyle — from architectural design through to the final finishing touches.

items.title: Home Additions
items.desc: Add space and value with second-storey additions, extensions and in-law suites that blend seamlessly with your home.

items.title: Whole-Home Renovations
items.desc: Transform dated spaces into modern, functional homes with a complete, professionally managed renovation.

items.title: Kitchens & Bathrooms
items.desc: Beautiful, hard-working kitchens and spa-like bathrooms designed and built to last.

items.title: Basement Finishing
items.desc: Unlock a whole extra floor — legal basement apartments, home theatres, gyms and living spaces.

items.title: Commercial Construction
items.desc: Office, retail and mixed-use build-outs and renovations delivered on schedule with minimal disruption.

projects.title: Our projects
projects.subtitle: Explore a selection of the custom homes, additions and renovations we've built across Toronto and the GTA.

items.title: Modern Custom Home
items.desc: A 4,200 sq ft contemporary custom home with an open-concept main floor and floor-to-ceiling glazing.

items.title: Second-Storey Addition
items.desc: Doubled the living space with a full second-storey addition, seamlessly matched to the original brick.

items.title: Chef's Kitchen Renovation
items.desc: A gut renovation delivering a bright, open chef's kitchen with custom cabinetry and quartz surfaces.

items.title: Whole-Home Renovation
items.desc: Complete interior transformation of a 1940s home into a modern, light-filled family space.

items.title: Legal Basement Suite
items.desc: A fully legal, self-contained basement apartment with private entrance and egress windows.

items.title: Spa Bathroom Retreat
items.desc: A luxurious primary ensuite featuring heated floors, a curbless shower and natural stone.

items.title: Retail Build-Out
items.desc: A ground-floor retail build-out completed after-hours to keep the surrounding units operating.

items.title: Custom Estate Home
items.desc: A 6,000 sq ft estate home with a natural-stone façade, elevator and resort-style backyard.

about.title: About EdgePress
about.subtitle: A Toronto builder you can trust — with the craftsmanship, credentials and care to match.
story: EdgePress was founded in 2008 with a simple belief: building or renovating a home should be exciting, not stressful. Over sixteen years we've grown into one of the Greater Toronto Area's most trusted custom home and renovation builders.

From our first renovation to the estate homes and commercial projects we deliver today, our approach hasn't changed — do exceptional work, communicate honestly, and treat every home as if it were our own. That's why so much of our work comes from repeat clients and referrals.
Today, our in-house team of designers, project managers and skilled trades handles every project end to end, so you have one accountable partner from the first sketch to the final walkthrough.

values.title: Integrity
values.desc: Honest advice, transparent pricing and no surprises — ever.

values.title: Craftsmanship
values.desc: Premium materials and skilled trades on every detail, big or small.

values.title: Accountability
values.desc: One dedicated team responsible for your project from start to finish.

values.title: Communication
values.desc: Regular updates and a project manager who answers the phone.

about.teamDesc: Every EdgePress project is guided by seasoned professionals who have spent their careers on job sites across the GTA. When you work with us, you work directly with the people building your home.

credentials.title: Licensed, certified & award-winning
credentials.subtitle: We hold every credential that protects you as a homeowner, and we're recognized by the industry's most respected organizations. (Representative credentials shown — verified certificates available on request.)

licenses.title: Licenses & Registrations
licenses.subtitle: Fully licensed, insured and warranty-backed so your investment is protected.

items.name: HCRA Licensed Builder
items.desc: Licensed by the Home Construction Regulatory Authority of Ontario.

items.name: Tarion Warranty Enrolled
items.desc: Every new home is enrolled in Ontario's Tarion new-home warranty program.

items.name: City of Toronto Licensed Contractor
items.desc: Municipal contractor and trades licensing in good standing.

items.name: WSIB Coverage
items.desc: Workplace Safety & Insurance Board coverage on every job site.

certifications.title: Certifications
certifications.subtitle: Trained and certified to build to the highest modern standards.

testimonials.title: What our clients say
testimonials.subtitle: We're proud of the relationships we build alongside the homes.

items.quote: EdgePress built our custom home exactly as promised — on budget and only a week off schedule despite a brutal winter. The craftsmanship is outstanding and their project manager was a phone call away the whole time.
items.author: Sarah & Michael T.

items.quote: We interviewed five builders for our second-storey addition. EdgePress was the only one who gave us a fixed price and a real schedule. They delivered on both. Our neighbours can't believe it's the same house.
items.author: David L.

items.quote: Our kitchen renovation was flawless from design to finish. Honest pricing, clean job site, and the quality is better than we imagined. We've already booked them for our basement.
items.author: Priya & Anand K.

items.quote: As a commercial landlord I've worked with many contractors. EdgePress's professionalism, permits knowledge and after-hours scheduling made them stand out. Highly recommended.
items.author: Robert M.
